message:
fix(types): use severity() instead of enum variant order in CancelKind comparisons

strengthen() and validate_transition() compared CancelKind values using
derived Ord (enum variant order), but severity() groups some variants at
the same level (e.g. Timeout=Deadline=1, PollQuota=CostBudget=2). This
caused Deadline to incorrectly "beat" Timeout even though both have equal
severity, and validate_transition to falsely report ReasonWeakened for
equal-severity kind changes. Use severity() for all comparisons, and
propagate kind in tie-breaking paths for consistency.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
